fields.name: Deferral Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for deferral template.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the record.

fields.name: Deferral Account
fields.tooltip: Specifies the G/L account that the deferred expenses are posted to.

fields.name: Deferral %
fields.tooltip: Specifies how much of the total amount will be deferred.

fields.name: Calc. Method
fields.tooltip: Specifies how the Amount field for each period is calculated.

fields.name: Start Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when to start calculating deferral amounts.

fields.name: No. of Periods
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many accounting periods the total amounts will be deferred to.

fields.name: Period Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description that will be shown on entries for the deferral posting.
